name: Soulforge Aptitude
descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
When {Ashen Ruins} refreshes, the discount chance +[Arg3]%, and the discount rate +[Arg4]%.
{Skull Reaver} Base DMG +[Arg5]%, which is calculated independently of the Base DMG increase from scoring kills.
